## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `ruff check skill_router/ tests/` and `ruff format --check skill_router/ tests/`.
- [ ] I have run `pytest tests/ -v` and all tests pass.

- [ ] This PR keeps the package zero-dependency (runtime).
